title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India:
Texas Instruments India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India!
